mainEntity.name: What ratio of copper wire to green circuits in Factorio?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3 copper cable assemblers feed exactly 2 green circuit assemblers (ratio 3:2). Each green circuit needs 3 copper cable and 1 iron plate. One full red belt of iron plates + 1.5 belts of copper plates feeds ~24 circuit assemblers.

mainEntity.name: How do I prevent train deadlocks in Factorio?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use Chain Signals before every intersection and Rail Signals after. Keep intersections small (fewer crossing points). Use roundabouts only for low-traffic areas. One-way rail pairs are much more throughput-friendly than two-way single tracks.
